title: 理论力学（英文）
description: Theoretical mechanics is a compulsory basic course for science and engineering students which is widely valued in the teaching process. The Department of Engineering Mechanics of Dalian University of Technology has tremendous strength, distinctive features, glorious history and has a strong and well-experienced teaching and research team. This includes three academicians of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, Lingxi Qian, Wanxie Zhong and Gengdong Cheng. After 60 years of development and evolution, the course of theoretical mechanics has gathered the wisdom through the painstaking efforts of several generations of university workers. In addition, this course has been unanimously recognized and highly appraised by domestic peers.

instructors.name: 赵岩;张伟;韩啸;曾岩;张永存;叶宏飞;李明;郑勇刚;阮诗伦;周震寰;马红艳
